text: Standing outside, anticipation stirs within me. I sense a threshold, a boundary separating the mundane from the intellectual. Entering the space, the vibrant colors and the 'R+D' wall ignite curiosity—a celebration of inquiry. I feel energized, aware of the collaborative spirit, and eager to explore how humanity and technology can merge in thoughtful ways. In this moment, I am both observer and participant, invited to ponder and to contribute.
